articles.description: Everything you need to know about the 2026 F1 Australian Grand Prix – including weather forecast, television info and schedule
articles.content:
It seemed like Formula 1 was only away for five minutes, because its 2026 campaign starts this weekend with the Australian Grand Prix to kickstart a new era for the championship.

articles.author: F1
articles.title: Cadillac confirm first upgrades for Australia debut - Formula 1
articles.description: Cadillac Team Principal Graeme Lowdon has confirmed that the squad will bring their first upgrades for their debut at the Australian Grand Prix, as the American outfit prepare for the “beginning of the journey” in Melbourne.
articles.content: This years Australian Grand Prix feels like no other, said Bottas. I always love coming to Melbourne, but this time, arriving to make history with the Cadillac Formula 1 Team, it is even more special… [+719 chars]
